item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: President Donald Trump will nominate his acting attorney general, Todd Blanche, to be the country’s top prosecutor, he said Wednesday evening.

media:content.media:text: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche Testifies During House Hearing
media:content.media:description: Todd Blanche entered the administration after having been Donald Trump's personal attorney.

item.title: Trump to nominate Todd Blanche to be attorney general

item.dc:creator: Katherine Doyle
Dan De Luce
item.description: Former officers worry Bill Pulte could use intelligence to target political opponents or justify federal oversight of elections.

media:content.media:text: Bill Pulte on Jan. 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Bill Pulte on Jan. 12.

item.title: New intel chief is a partisan warrior who has the president’s ear, sources say

item.description: An Iran drone attack on Kuwait’s main airport killed one and injured dozens more. Still, late today President Trump dismissed the latest violence and said a longer term peace deal could be reached this weekend. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports from the region.

media:content.media:title: New attacks by Iran and U.S. strain an already shaky ceasefire
media:content.media:description: An Iran drone attack on Kuwait’s main airport killed one and injured dozens more. Still, late today President Trump dismissed the latest violence and said a longer term peace deal could be reached this weekend. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports from the region.

item.title: New attacks by Iran and U.S. strain an already shaky ceasefire

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When the New York Knicks needed a big basket against the San Antonio Spurs in Game 1 of the NBA Finals, they turned to Jalen Brunson. He delivered.

media:content.media:text: 2026 NBA Finals - Game One
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks shoots against Stephon Castle of the San Antonio Spurs in San Antonio on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama reacts during the fourth quarter.
media:content.media:description: Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks shoots against Stephon Castle of the San Antonio Spurs in San Antonio on Wednesday.

item.title: The Knicks’ Jalen Brunson can already do what the Spurs are still figuring out

item.dc:creator: Matt Dixon
Scott Wong
item.description: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz faces pushback from Black Democrats after she decided to run in a newly redrawn district that has a plurality of Black voters and a crowded primary field.

media:content.media:text: Haiti TPS Presser
media:content.media:description: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz, D-Fla., announced plans to run in the 20th Congressional District, which has traditionally had a Black member of Congress.

media:content.media:text: Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick 3/26/26
media:content.media:description: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz, D-Fla., announced plans to run in the 20th Congressional District, which has traditionally had a Black member of Congress.

media:content.media:text: Luther "Uncle Luke" Campbell For Congress Fundraiser
media:content.media:description: Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz, D-Fla., announced plans to run in the 20th Congressional District, which has traditionally had a Black member of Congress.

item.title: Florida lawmaker criticized for running in district long represented by Black Democrats

item.dc:creator: Jane C. Timm
item.description: After 10 states enacted new congressional maps, Republicans are in position to gain up to 16 seats this fall, compared with six for the Democrats, as the parties vie for control of the House.

media:content.media:text: Bloomberg Best Of The Year 2025
media:content.media:description: The 2026 redistricting cycle began last year in Texas at President Donald Trump's urging.

item.title: Where the redistricting fight stands heading into the midterms

item.dc:creator: Laura Strickler
item.description: A DHS watchdog report revealed that staff members at Winn Correctional Center used a prohibited chokehold to “gain control” of a person being held there and stabbed another in the hand with a pen when an officer could not close the door to a housing unit.

media:content.media:text: ICE Detention Center Louisiana
media:content.media:description: Winn Correctional Center, an ICE detention facility, in Winnfield, La., on April 9.

item.title: DHS watchdog finds use-of-force issues and safety and sanitation concerns at Louisiana ICE center

item.description: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg during a major economic forum. NBC News' Keir Simmons reports.

media:content.media:title: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg
media:content.media:description: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg during a major economic forum. NBC News' Keir Simmons reports.

item.title: New video shows apparent Ukrainian attacks on Russian targets in St. Petersburg

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: NBC News’ chief international correspondent will be in St. Petersburg, Russia, for a live Q&A. Submit your questions here.

media:content.media:text: Keir Simmons on "Meet the Press."
media:content.media:description: Keir Simmons.

item.title: Submit your questions for NBC News’ Keir Simmons

item.description: The veteran correspondent is accusing CBS leadership of lying about his termination and interfering with the editorial independence of “60 Minutes.” NBC News’ Erin McLaughlin reports.

media:content.media:title: Scott Pelley disputes CBS account of firing as tensions mount at ‘60 Minutes’
media:content.media:description: The veteran correspondent is accusing CBS leadership of lying about his termination and interfering with the editorial independence of “60 Minutes.” NBC News’ Erin McLaughlin reports.

item.title: Scott Pelley disputes CBS account of firing as tensions mount at ‘60 Minutes’

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the case would go to the Court of Appeal to be reviewed — but advocates say the initial sentences speak to a wider failing.

media:content.media:text: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Jess Phillips visits West Midlands Police control room
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

media:content.media:text: Million Women Rise march in London
media:content.media:description: One of the victims was raped by two boys in an underpass, pictured, after arranging to meet one of them for a date in November 2024.

item.title: Decision to allow 3 boys convicted of rape to walk free sparks fury and debate in U.K.

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: A flesh-eating parasite that had been kept out of U.S. livestock for decades has been detected in Texas, threatening the nation’s cattle industry and food supply at a time when prices are already high.

media:content.media:text: Screwworm Livestock
media:content.media:description: An adult New World screwworm fly sits in this undated photo.

media:content.media:text: Screwworm Livestock
media:content.media:description: An adult New World screwworm fly sits in this undated photo.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm returns to U.S. after 60 years, threatening cattle herd

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: The former striker will serve as a World Cup commentator for Telemundo, the tournament’s official Spanish-language network.

media:content.media:text: Jozy Altidore
media:content.media:description: Jozy Altidore, a former Toronto FC player, delivers the match ball before a match between Toronto FC and Inter Miami CF in Toronto on May 9.

media:content.media:text: United States forward Jozy Altidore (17)
media:content.media:description: Jozy Altidore, a former Toronto FC player, delivers the match ball before a match between Toronto FC and Inter Miami CF in Toronto on May 9.

item.title: Jozy Altidore, now a broadcaster, is bullish on the U.S. making a deep World Cup run

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said Tuesday the Justice Department was “not moving forward” with the $1.8 billion fund.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump speaks to the press in the Oval Office of the White House in Washington, DC, on June 3, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Acting AG Blanche Testifies Before House Appropriations Subcommittee
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche at a House Appropriations subcommittee hearing in Washington on Tuesday.

item.title: Trump says he’s not sure if ‘anti-weaponization’ fund is really dead: ‘I’d have to ask the lawyers’

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: All but one of the 280 former students who sued the school through five lawsuits for failing to protect them from a man accused of being a sexual predator have signed on to the agreement.

media:content.media:text: US-VOTE-YOUTH-OHIO
media:content.media:description: Students walk across the campus of The Ohio State University in Columbus, Ohio on November 6, 2023.

media:content.media:text: Dr. Richard Strauss from a 1978 Ohio State University employment application.
media:content.media:description: Dr. Richard Strauss from a 1978 Ohio State University employment application.

item.title: Ohio State University reaches $100 million settlement in sex abuse lawsuits

item.description: We’re tracking the best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live, including discounts on tech, home, beauty, kitchen products and more before the four-day sale begins.

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists share their product recommendations and shopping tips for supportive, comfortable insoles that can help with arch pain, plantar fasciitis and more.

media:content.media:text: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.
media:content.media:description: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.

media:content.media:text: According to the podiatrists we spoke to, over-the-counter insoles work best in sneakers.

item.title: The best insoles for your sneakers
